description_long: This stool features a minimalist, open-frame design constructed from slender, rectangular wooden slats. The seat is composed of evenly spaced horizontal slats, providing a lightweight and airy appearance. The stool is supported by four straight legs, each extending directly downward from the corners, giving it a stable stance. A partial backrest and armrest are formed by additional slats, with the backrest extending across one side and the armrest wrapping around two adjacent sides, creating an asymmetrical, modern look. The overall finish is smooth and matte, with a natural wood tone dominating the visual impression. There are no visible decorative elements, emphasizing its functional and contemporary style.
description: A minimalist wooden stool with slatted seat, partial backrest, and armrest, finished in a natural wood tone. Its open-frame design and clean lines give it a modern, airy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the partial backrest and armrest on the left side, with the slatted seat and four straight legs visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open slatted seat and the asymmetrical armrest wrapping around two sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest slat and the open structure of the frame, with the seat slats clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the single armrest and the clean, straight lines of the legs and seat slats.
